Hearing On Expedited Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor. (Mya Galinsky)
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Kavita Sharma, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Greg Galinsky, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Mya Galinsky; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $8,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
A net balance of $8,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America, San Pablo Avenue, Emeryville, CA 94608, until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on August 21, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
